classes.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig

methods.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.str_dict
documentation: Storage options as str dict.

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.allow_http
documentation: Allow non-TLS, i.e. non-HTTPS connections

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.allow_invalid_certificates
documentation:
Skip certificate validation on https connections.

## Warning

You should think very carefully before using this method.
If invalid certificates are trusted, any certificate for any site will be trusted for use.
This includes expired certificates. This introduces significant vulnerabilities,
and should only be used as a last resort or for testing

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.connect_timeout
documentation: Timeout for only the connect phase of a Client

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.http2_keep_alive_interval
documentation: Interval for HTTP2 Ping frames should be sent to keep a connection alive.

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.http2_keep_alive_timeout
documentation: Timeout for receiving an acknowledgement of the keep-alive ping.

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.http2_keep_alive_while_idle
documentation: Enable HTTP2 keep alive pings for idle connections

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.http2_only
documentation: Only use http2 connections

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.pool_idle_timeout
documentation:
The pool max idle timeout

This is the length of time an idle connection will be kept alive

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.pool_max_idle_per_host
documentation: maximum number of idle connections per host

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.proxy_url
documentation: HTTP proxy to use for requests

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.timeout
documentation:
Request timeout

The timeout is applied from when the request starts connecting until the response body has finished

class_variables.name: dagster_deltalake.config.ClientConfig.user_agent
documentation: User-Agent header to be used by this client
Configuration for http client interacting with storage APIs.
